author: SantiMod
content:
Atlassian Town Hall today! 
 
 Today at 3 PM PST (10 PM GMT), join us on the Atlas Amphitheater for a traditional Star Atlas Town Hall! 

 You'll be able to talk directly with Michael Wagner, CEO! Ask your questions live on the Townhall or on ⁠No Access !

https://www.tickcounter.com/countdown/2618743/star-atlas-townhall-9
